description: FullStory digital experience analytics — sync session recordings, users, and segments via the FullStory REST API v2.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: Found in FullStory Settings → Integrations → API Keys. Pass as Bearer token.

rate_limits.note: FullStory enforces per-organization rate limits on REST API v2 calls. The connector respects 429 responses and retries with exponential backoff.
